---
title: "PCA and volcano plot"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
# PCA and volcano plot
library(DESeq2)
library(ggplot2)
library(EnhancedVolcano)
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)

# shared theme for figures
base_theme <- theme_bw() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = "grey90"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.title       = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),  # ← increased size, added bold
    axis.text        = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),  # ← increased size, added bold
    legend.title     = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
    legend.text      = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.position  = "top",
    plot.title       = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    plot.tag         = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold")
  )

# Panel A: PCA
dds_all <- readRDS("dds_all.rds")
rld     <- rlog(dds_all, blind = TRUE)

pcaData    <- plotPCA(rld, intgroup = "age", returnData = TRUE)
percentVar <- round(100 * attr(pcaData, "percentVar"))

pcaData$age <- factor(pcaData$age, levels = c("young", "old"))
pcaData$clean_label <- ave(
  as.character(pcaData$age), pcaData$age,
  FUN = function(x) paste0(tools::toTitleCase(x[1]), " ", seq_along(x))
)

pca_plot <- ggplot(pcaData, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, colour = age, label = clean_label)) +
  geom_point(size = 4, alpha = 0.9) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("young" = "#00BFC4", "old" = "#F8766D"),
                      labels = c("Young", "Old")) +
  labs(
    x      = paste0("PC1 (", percentVar[1], "%)"),
    y      = paste0("PC2 (", percentVar[2], "%)"),
    colour = "Group",
    tag    = "A",
    title  = "Principal Component Analysis"
  ) +
  base_theme +
  theme(aspect.ratio = 1)

# Panel B: Volcano
df <- read.csv("deseq_results_with_symbols.csv") %>%
  filter(!is.na(padj), !is.na(gene_symbol), gene_symbol != "")

DEG_annotOrdered <- df %>% arrange(padj)
top_genes        <- head(DEG_annotOrdered$gene_symbol, 17)
y_max            <- ceiling(max(-log10(DEG_annotOrdered$padj), na.rm = TRUE)) + 1

volcano_plot <- EnhancedVolcano(
  DEG_annotOrdered,
  lab             = DEG_annotOrdered$gene_symbol,
  selectLab       = top_genes,
  parseLabels     = FALSE,
  col             = c("grey70", "#00A087", "#6DBBE1", "red"),
  x               = "log2FoldChange",
  y               = "padj",
  FCcutoff        = 2.0,
  pCutoff         = 0.05,
  pointSize       = 0.8,
  labSize         = 3.0,
  legendIconSize  = 4,
  colAlpha        = 0.5,
  borderWidth     = 0,
  xlim            = c(-8, 8),
  ylim            = c(0, y_max),
  title           = "Differentially Expressed Genes",
  subtitle        = "adj. p < 0.05  |  |log.FC| > 2",
  caption         = paste0("total = ", nrow(DEG_annotOrdered), " variables"),
  axisLabSize     = 10,
  titleLabSize    = 12,
  subtitleLabSize = 9,
  legendLabSize   = 8,
  captionLabSize  = 8,
  drawConnectors  = FALSE,
  boxedLabels     = FALSE,
  gridlines.major = FALSE,
  gridlines.minor = FALSE,
  cutoffLineType  = "dashed",
  cutoffLineWidth = 0.4,
  xlab            = bquote(~Log[2] ~ "fold change"),
  ylab            = bquote(-Log[10] ~ "adjusted p-value")
) +
  labs(tag = "B") +
  base_theme

combined <- pca_plot + volcano_plot + plot_layout(ncol = 2, widths = c(1, 1))

ggsave("deseq_pca_volcano.pdf", plot = combined, width = 30, height = 14, units = "cm")
message("✔ Saved deseq_pca_volcano.pdf")
```
